/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmotor_test__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libmotor_test__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/motor_test__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_test/msg/detail/motor_param__description.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_test__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_test/msg/detail/motor_param__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_test__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_test/msg/detail/motor_param__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_test__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_test/msg/detail/motor_feedback_entry__description.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_test__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_test/msg/detail/motor_feedback_entry__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_test__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_test/msg/detail/motor_feedback_entry__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_test__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_test/msg/detail/motor_feedback__description.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_test__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_test/msg/detail/motor_feedback__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/motor_test__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_test/msg/detail/motor_feedback__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
